description: Lock Technical Drawing Standards to a 1588 Ramelli-style machine illustration scope without patent or calibration prerequisites.

checks.reason: Ramelli's Le diverse et artificiose machine provides a source-backed 1588 anchor for detailed Renaissance technical machine drawings.
The scoped node remains a visual projection and technical illustration convention.
Patent systems are downstream or adjacent users of drawings, not prerequisites for the Ramelli-style machine-book scope.
Instrument calibration standards are narrower measurement infrastructure, not required for Renaissance machine illustration conventions.
